description: Prisma init --db migration touching auth, database, and config
rationale: auth.ts = auth (8 lines). auth-client.ts = database (10 lines, contains database client logic). package.json + pnpm-lock.yaml = config (62 lines). 3 domains = ERROR.
notes: auth-client.ts classified as database despite 'auth' in name - worth investigating if this is correct or a false positive from semantic analysis.
